structured.title: Wrestling Promo Targets Roman Reigns And Pat McAfee
structured.overview: The content is a heated pro wrestling-style promo centered on WrestleMania. The speaker attacks Roman Reigns, contrasting their own "self‑made" tools and dangerous unpredictability with Roman's alleged corporate favoritism, being "plastic," manufactured, and protected by family, executives, and yes-men. The promo criticizes Roman for media appearances like Jimmy Fallon, alleged unreliability (showing up late, leaving early), and leaning on Hollywood status in a business defined as wrestling, not cinema. The speaker also calls out Pat McAfee for entering the wrestling business and talking about ticket sales, telling him to have his agent lower prices and promising a physical "receipt". The speech builds toward the promise of standing over Roman Reigns at WrestleMania.

apps_results.content:
## WrestleMania Setup  
- Setting framed as "WrestleMania, granddaddy of them all"  
- Speaker compares paths to the top of the company  
- Emphasis on both having tools to reach the pinnacle  

## Self-made vs Manufactured  
- Speaker calls his tools self-made, sharp, earned  
- Roman’s tools called store-bought, hand-delivered, plastic  
- Claims years of self-belief vs Roman’s manufactured image  

## Critique of Roman Reigns  
- Says company and TKO push Roman because he’s "safe"  
- Calls Roman boring, plastic, and protected by yes-men  
- Says Roman skips shows, arrives late, leaves early  

## Hollywood and The Rock  
- Compares Roman’s behavior to The Rock backstage  
- Says at least Rock *was* a real Hollywood superstar  
- Stresses: this is pro wrestling, not cinema  

## Independence and Threat  
- Claims no family on board, no wise men, no advocates  
- Says Roman’s family can’t control him like others  
- Says he can "blow it up" and knows how to swim  

## Calling Out Pat McAfee  
- Says Pat came into *his* business running his mouth  
- Accuses Pat’s agent of forcing him into the show  
- Tells them to lower ticket prices for fans  

## WrestleMania Promise / Next Steps  
- Promises Pat will get a "receipt" for disrespect  
- Says families will pay to see him stand over Roman  
- Targets Roman at WrestleMania, vows to crush his reign
